title: T5 Watchtower: Kanban board over the engine store (read-only v1)
prompt: Build the Watchtower app's first real view: a read-only kanban board over the dark-factory engine store. In ~/dev/ad/apps/watchtower (AppyStack RVETS, client :5060 / server :5061 — NOT dark-factory's untracked apps/watchtower junk dir, NOT experiments/watchtower-board): render engine/store/queue|running|done as three lanes, one card per ticket with title, ticket id, kind/priority badges, age (queue: since requested_at; running: since claimed_at), claimant (claimed_by), and done-lane verdict (normalized result + notes). Engine seam is `python3 engine/status.py --json` spawned by the watchtower server and served at GET /api/board (reuse/extract T5-01's /api/engine/status spawn and DARK_FACTORY_ROOT env var if landed — one spawn implementation ever; mount the board route above apiLimiter, whose 100/15min would 429 the 5s client poll); client polls every 5s, tolerates schema drift with optional-chaining, shows HALT/BACKOFF badges. One additive-only edit to dark-factory's engine/status.py adds the missing per-item fields (kind, priority, executor, requested_at, running age_s, done created_at) — human output must diff clean apart from timestamps, and no other engine file may be touched. v1 mutates nothing: no POST routes, no store writes, no Socket.io push, no needs-decision lane (T5-06's job). Ship shared types, server route + vitest/supertest tests (200 + 502 paths), BoardPage client, README/CLAUDE.md doc updates, and commit+push BOTH repos. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T5-02-kanban-board.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: In ~/dev/ad/apps/watchtower: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run lint all exit 0 (including new board.test.ts 200- and 502-path tests). With the dev pair up, curl -s localhost:5061/api/board returns status:'ok' whose data.queue.depth / data.running.count / data.done.total equal a same-moment ls count of dark-factory's engine/store/queue|running|done *.json; 30 rapid curls of /api/board return zero 429s; the browser at :5060 shows QUEUE/RUNNING/DONE lanes with matching counts, mono ticket ids, kind/priority badges, ages, claimed_by on running cards, and a verdict badge + collapsible notes on done cards. python3 status.py --json --n-done 5 (in dark-factory/engine) emits the new per-item keys (kind/priority/executor/requested_at on queue items, created_at+result on done items) while plain status.py human output diffs clean against a pre-change capture except generated_at/ages. Negative: git diff shows engine/status.py as the ONLY dark-factory engine change, engine/store/ has zero dirt from this ticket, board.ts has no POST/PUT/DELETE, app.use(apiLimiter) still present with the board route mounted above it, and an ls of the three store dirs before/after ≥2 poll cycles is byte-identical. Both repos committed and pushed (watchtower feat(board) commit; dark-factory feat(engine) additive status.py commit).
